legacy.description: 🇬🇧Multi-award winning photographer & filmmaker. Creator of Invisible Oceans & Fluid Perspectives NFT collections. Known for his work on Gravity & The Fountain
legacy.name: Chris Parks

legacy.full_text:
So flat and transparent that you can read a newspaper through them.  This is a phyllosoma larva of the slipper lobster which we photographed on Lizard Island, Australia, in 2006.

100 1/1's all shot on film over about 30 yrs of expeditions

0.1 ETH on Foundation

1/2 https://t.co/b22wnujLvB

value.string_value: Surely this extraordinarily flat and transparent larval stage of a type of lobster called a 'bug' in Australia, 'Slipper Lobster' sometimes and 'Crawfish' in ot…

legacy.description: This is the start of something new.
legacy.name: Foundation 🌐

legacy.full_text:
Invisible Oceans #20: Phyllosoma I

It spends a year hitchhiking round the oceans on the back of jellyfish, hydromedusae or salps before settling out on the sea floor.  The legs and eyes drift off.  The central section becomes a fully grown lobster. 

https://t.co/i0c0TrqWjR

2/2
